steps.title: Focus on material contrast
steps.content: The notes give one direct difference between the two installations: Water Line is composed of aluminum tubing, while Seven Earth Mountain is composed of soil. The answer must name both works and emphasize that contrast.

steps.title: Reject choices without contrast
steps.content: B groups the works together without distinguishing them. C mentions only Water Line and the Vietnam Veterans Memorial. D also leaves out Seven Earth Mountain, so it cannot compare the two works. The answer is A.
